## Validation and evidence

<!-- Commands, CI jobs, workflow URLs, environment, artifact digests -->

## Review checklist

- [ ] The PR contains one reviewable Gate or change unit.
- [ ] Status, owner, Issue, and upstream documents are recorded.
- [ ] Requirement/design/test IDs are updated or explicitly not applicable.
- [ ] Normal, boundary, negative, and failure behavior were considered.
- [ ] Security permissions and trust boundaries were reviewed or are not affected.
- [ ] CI and long-lived evidence are linked.
- [ ] CHANGELOG and user documentation are updated or not affected.
- [ ] No unresolved release blocker or unaccepted Critical/High risk remains.
